drd_rule_full:
Use APACSH logic from 'ETL Notes' tab.

[ETL Notes block]:
Check for regexp_like(cv.cl_val_code,'^APACSH[0-7][0-9]')
For a Transaction, 
If only one record exists then consider that record.
If 2 records exists ( 
     If (one record is 'APACSH04' & other is 'APACSH11') 
          then consider skip 'APACSH04' record and load 'APACSH11' but use the values to
          (1) calculate aggregated value from APA.TXN_AMT fields from 'APACSH04' and 'APACSH11' and store it in Cash Transaction Amount and Cash System base currency amount
          (2) populate sales charge attributes from 'APACSH04' for 5 attributes (Sales Charge Rate Multiplier Number, Sales Charge Rate, Sales Charge Rate Type Code, Sales Charge Rate Type Id, Sales Charge Rate Type Name)
     else Drop those 2 records exception entire transaction
)

APASEC :
Check for cl_val_Code like '^APASEC[0-7][0-9]' THEN consider as 'Security' record.

iAPASEC/iAPACSH:
Refer to below section for further filter criteria on iAPASEC/iAPACSH. Applicable to both iAPACSH and iAPASEC.
odi_full_chain: *STEP3[column_ref]: APA_CASH.APA_TP_CD ->  STEP4[passthrough]: AVY_FACT_STEP3_STG_RT.CASH_APA_TP_CD ->  STEP5[passthrough]: AVY_FACT_STEP4_STG_RT.CASH_APA_TP_CD ->  MERGE_USING[passthrough]: AVY_FACT_STEP5_STG_RT.CASH_APA_TP_CD ->  MERGE[column_ref]: S.CASH_APA_TP_CD
recommendation: DENORMALIZED_LOOKUP -- DRD wants JOIN to CL_VAL lookup (CL_VAL_CODE); ODI denormalises and stores the pre-resolved value directly in APA_CASH.APA_TP_CD.  Different physical columns; VALUES are likely equivalent (the denormalised code/name should match the lookup result).  Operator must confirm against PDM + sample data.

drd_rule_full:
Use CL_VAL_ID =   check in CL_VAL table where CL_SCM_ID = 114 and use CL_VAL_CODE

[ETL Notes block]:
Check for regexp_like(cv.cl_val_code,'^APACSH[0-7][0-9]')
For a Transaction, 
If only one record exists then consider that record.
If 2 records exists ( 
     If (one record is 'APACSH04' & other is 'APACSH11') 
          then consider skip 'APACSH04' record and load 'APACSH11' but use the values to
          (1) calculate aggregated value from APA.TXN_AMT fields from 'APACSH04' and 'APACSH11' and store it in Cash Transaction Amount and Cash System base currency amount
          (2) populate sales charge attributes from 'APACSH04' for 5 attributes (Sales Charge Rate Multiplier Number, Sales Charge Rate, Sales Charge Rate Type Code, Sales Charge Rate Type Id, Sales Charge Rate Type Name)
     else Drop those 2 records exception entire transaction
)

APASEC :
Check for cl_val_Code like '^APASEC[0-7][0-9]' THEN consider as 'Security' record.

iAPASEC/iAPACSH:
Refer to below section for further filter criteria on iAPASEC/iAPACSH. Applicable to both iAPACSH and iAPASEC.
